name: apxm
description: APXM orchestration workflows for Codex: councils, verified workers, graph execution, skill-to-workflow conversion, and trace verification.

interface.longDescription: APXM packages reusable Codex skills for selecting verified workers, running traceable multi-perspective councils, converting skills into APXM workflows, executing APXM graphs through Dekk, and verifying traces.
defaultPrompt: Run an APXM Council on this decision.
Use APXM to orchestrate this task across agents.
Ask an APXM worker to propose a graph.
